slide-1.text: I want it to be super clear when things are passed to an agent and what its job was. So on this slide i should be able to instantly know how many different agents were used.
lets rename scoring agent to Evolution on Prompts to predict song purchase

slide-3.text: Good meta learnings that its own certainty is useful. and that it over estimates its rightness on hard problems. Would be worth reviewing what types of problems it got wrong. and adding these things to the meta library of knowledge here.
